articles.title: Bancor Progress Update (March 2021)
articles.description: In the last month, the total value locked in the Bancor Protocol has more than doubled, exceeding $1.6 billion. Bancor broke into the top 10 projects by TVL and now generates the fifth highest revenue of any protocol on Ethereum. Bancor’s traction in the DeFi world is developing rapidly. LPs are increasingly reluctant to risk their capital under the threat of impermanent loss on...

articles.title: Chainlink Set To Surge on Release of Dynamic NFTs, Says Crypto Trader Tyler Swope
articles.description: Crypto analyst and trader Tyler Swope is placing Chainlink (LINK) in the spotlight as the oracle project prepares to dive head first into the non-fungible token (NFT) space. In a new video, Swope tracks the little-known connection between Chainlink and the emerging digital art industry. The trader highlights that the number one oracle project in […]

articles.title: Bitcoin Near All-Time High, but This On-Chain Metric Suggests the Party Might Soon Be Over
articles.description: Bitcoin miners have been selling smaller amounts of BTC as the price of the flagship cryptocurrency moved up from $11,000 late last year to a $58,000 all-time high last month. Once they start taking profits, BTC could endure another correction. According to the creator of on-chain data resource LookIntoBitcoin, Philip Swift, data shows that miners […]

articles.title: IOTA Foundation Unveils New Version of Pollen Testnet
articles.description: The IOTA Foundation has introduced a new version of the Pollen Testnet with a range of significant changes and enhancements. IOTA-Mana Collab According to the report, this release marks the official start of IOTA’s journey with Mana, a new reputation framework incorporated into pollen to mitigate Sybil attacks. articles.title: Bitcoin Drops to $55k on News of the US CFTC Investigating Binance
articles.description: In brief: According to Bloomberg, the US CFTC is probing Binance on whether it allowed US residents to trade derivatives on the platform Bitcoin took a $2k nosedive from $57k to $55k as a result March 12th might be a cursed date for Bitcoin as the Coronavirus dip happened exactly one year ago The US CFTC (Commodity Futures Trading Commission) is reportedly probing whether Binance knowingly allowed US residents to trade derivatives on the platform. According to Bloomberg, the CFTC […]

articles.title: Alameda Research buys $20 million in REEF tokens linked to Polkadot-based DeFi project
articles.description: Polkadot-based DeFi project Reef Finance has raised $20 million in a token sale round.

articles.title: REEF Finance Receives $20 Million Investment from Alameda Research
articles.description: REEF Finance saw a $20 million investment from Alameda Research. It was done through the purchase of REEF tokens.

articles.title: Ripple Giant and Coinbase Shift Staggering 237 Million XRP
articles.description: Ripple fintech behemoth and major U.S. digital exchange, Coinbase, have transferred a massive amount of XRP tokens: 237.1 million

articles.title: Ethereum Co-Founder Vitalik Buterin Says Network Will Scale 100X ‘Very Soon’
articles.description: Ethereum co-founder Vitalik Buterin says the network is on the verge of 100X scaling with the release of its layer-two solution coming in the near future. Speaking on the Tim Ferriss Podcast, Buterin said Optimism is launching its mainnet soon, which would give users access to long-awaited layer-two solutions for scaling. articles.title: Japanese Financial Giant SBI Group to Offer Shareholders’ Year-End Benefit in XRP
articles.description: XRP is gaining more traction in Japan, with SBI Group now offering benefits in the cryptocurrency

articles.title: Long-Term Bitcoin HODLers Keep Accumulating as Newcomers Take Profits, Data Shows
articles.description: Data shows that long-term bitcoin HODLers do not appear to be selling their holdings, even as the price of bitcoin tops $55,000 – more than double its previous all-time high near $19,000. Newcomers, on the other hand, have been taking profits. As reported by Cointelegraph, Unchained Capital’s “Hodlwaves” chart – which visually illustrates BTC wallets […]
